31],[310,551,1776530213351],[311,550,1776530213367],[311,549,1776530213378],[312,548,1776530213386],[313,547,1776530213394],[314,546,1776530213415],[315,545,1776530213427],[316,545,1776530213437],[316,544,1776530213453],[317,543,1776530213460],[318,542,1776530213472],[319,541,1776530213485],[319,540,1776530213500],[320,539,1776530213510],[321,539,1776530213517],[320,539,1776530213541],[319,538,1776530213556],[318,538,1776530213569],[317,537,1776530213581],[316,537,1776530213587],[315,536,1776530213600],[314,536,1776530213608],[313,536,1776530213631],[312,535,1776530213637],[311,535,1776530213651],[310,535,1776530213659],[309,534,1776530213669],[308,534,1776530213679],[307,533,1776530213688],[307,533,1776530213706],[306,534,1776530213719],[305,534,1776530213738],[305,535,1776530213763],[304,536,1776530213783],[304,537,1776530213814]],"mm-mp":17.81801801801802,"md":[[321,539,1776530213529]],"md-mp":4388.0,"mu":[[321,539,1776530213698]],"mu-mp":4413.25},"v":1,"tc":{}}
